# Grove - Temperature Humidity Pressure Sensor

## Introduction

This board is based on BME280 and communicates with a host over I2C.

## Features

- Measures three environmental quantities
- Interface: I2C

## Typical Applications

- Indoor weather monitoring
- Altitude experiments

## Technical Specifications

| Parameter | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Temperature range | -40 to 85 degrees celsius |
| Humidity range | 0 to 100 percent |
| Pressure range | 300 to 1100 hPa |

## Pins

- SDA: I2C data
- SCL: I2C clock
- VCC: Power input

## References

- [Datasheet](https://files.seeedstudio.com/bme280.pdf)
